title: Megatrend Entity
description: Schema for validating megatrend.md YAML frontmatter. Megatrends classify findings thematically. Structure depends on megatrend_structure: 'tips' uses TIPS strategic narrative (Trend-Implication-Possibility-Solution) for smarter-service research; 'generic' uses domain-based structure (What it is/What it does/What it means) for other research types.

tags.description: Classification tags including entity type, megatrend marker, and dimension

dc:creator.description: Dublin Core creator field - skill that created the megatrend

dc:title.description: Dublin Core title field - megatrend name (2-4 words)

dc:identifier.description: Dublin Core identifier - unique megatrend ID with 8-char hash

dc:created.description: Dublin Core creation timestamp - ISO 8601 format

dc:subject.description: Dublin Core subject field - megatrend subject

megatrend_structure.description: Content structure type - 'tips' for TIPS megatrend narrative (smarter-service), 'generic' for domain-based structure (What it is/does/means)

finding_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to findings classified under this megatrend

finding_count.description: Number of findings supporting this megatrend

parent_megatrend_ref.description: Wikilink to parent megatrend (for hierarchical megatrends)

submegatrend_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to child megatrends

description.description: Megatrend description (legacy field, use strategic_narrative instead)

source_type.description: How this megatrend originated - clustered (bottom-up from findings), seeded (top-down from expert knowledge), or hybrid (seed validated by findings)

seed_validated.description: Whether this seed megatrend was validated by discovered findings

seed_name.description: Original seed megatrend name if this megatrend matches a seed

evidence_strength.description: Strength of evidence supporting this megatrend

confidence_score.description: Composite confidence score (0.0-1.0) based on evidence strength, finding count, and claim coverage

planning_horizon.description: Urgency classification - act (0-6 months), plan (6-18 months), observe (18+ months)

dimension_affinity.description: Primary dimension this megatrend relates to (slug format)

claim_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to claims supporting this megatrend

trend.description: Observable pattern summary - what is happening (evidence-based)

implication.description: What this means for the industry/organization

oneOf.description: Structured possibility with chance/risk framing (recommended for act horizon)

chance.description: Value gained by acting on this megatrend

risk.description: Cost of not acting on this megatrend

quality_scores.description: Quality assessment scores for this megatrend

citation_count.description: Number of inline citations in the megatrend content connecting claims to findings

content_metrics.description: Word count metrics for content quality verification

total_word_count.description: Total word count of megatrend content (target: 550-900 for TIPS, 400-600 for generic)

key_findings_summary.description: Top 3-5 supporting findings with summaries for the Key Findings section

summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary connecting finding to megatrend thesis

related_trends.description: Wikilinks to related trends that manifest this megatrend

related_megatrends.description: Wikilinks to related megatrends showing synergies or tensions

possibility.description: ACT horizon requires structured possibility with chance/risk framing

finding_refs.description: When finding_count > 0, finding_refs MUST be populated with wikilinks to member findings
